title: Wholesome Charred Australian Digestive Crumble
description: A charred, molten post-workout snack that blends Australian digestive biscuits with shio-cure and ayurvedic spices for a tamasic-friendly treat.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180C and line a baking tray with parchment.
Toast digestive biscuits in a skillet over medium heat until lightly browned.
Melt butter, stir in honey, soy sauce, ginger, turmeric, and cinnamon until smooth.
Toss toasted biscuits in mixture until well coated, then spread on tray.
Bake for 10 minutes until edges are crisp.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly, then top with frozen berries and pour coconut milk over.
Return to oven for 5 minutes to allow berries to soften.
Brush with a thin glaze of soy-honey mix for shine.
Enjoy as a charred post-workout snack.
